html:
Exclusive to:  

Fish is a Meat Food Item that typically comes from Ponds. It is also dropped by Merms. It restores 12.5 Hunger and stacks to 40 in the inventory. Fish can be dried on the Drying Rack for 1 day to produce Small Jerky, and are the main ingredient in Fishsticks and Fish Tacos using a Crock Pot. Fishing (like killing Gobblers) does not increase the player's Naughtiness level, meaning it is a safe food source for those fearing Krampus.

Unlike most other Meat Foods, Fish can be eaten raw without losing Sanity.

Fish can be obtained by using a Fishing Rod at a Pond or Lake, or dropped by Merms when killed (along with Frog Legs).

Cooked Fish

Cooked Fish is obtained by cooking Fish at a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. Unlike most foods, it is no different in hunger and health restoration than its raw version, though it spoils slower than raw fish. Like all cooked foods, it cannot be dried on a Drying Rack.

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Fish can be obtained by using a Trawl Net in the Ocean.

In the Hamlet DLC, Fish and Cooked Fish have an alternate appearance based on carp. Fish can be obtained from Kingfishers or by destroying a Tasteful Fish Mounting.

Trivia

  • When a Fish is on the ground, it flops around, then perishes, its eyes becoming crossed out.
  • Fish having a spoilage time of 3 days could be a reference to one of Benjamin Franklin's quotes, "Guests are like fish. They stink after 3 days."

Bugs

  • The Hamlet Fish has no unique Drying Rack texture.

Gallery

  • Wilson reeling in a Fish.
  • Alive Fish.
  • Dead Fish.
  • Fish as seen in the Autumn promo for Reign of Giants.
  • Original HD Fish icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Fish Cooked icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

“Now I shall eat for a day.”
–Wilson, when examining a Fish.
“Slippery fishy!”
–Willow, when examining a Fish.
“Is fishy.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fish.
“It was flopping around desperately for life. The poor fool.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fish.
“IT'S TO SCALE”
–WX-78, when examining a Fish.
“Some kind of whitefish, I believe.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fish.
“Looks like a cod.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fish.
“Fresh from the murky depths.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fish.
“Remarkable! Upon its death, 'X's appear on its eyes.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Fish.
“Meat öf the sea!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fish.
“It could stand to be fried.”
–Webber, when examining a Fish.
“Blub blub, little chum.”
–Walani, when examining a Fish.
“Poisson!”
–Warly, when examining a Fish.
“Fish! One o'me favorites.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Fish.
“'TIS FLOPPY FISH”
–Wilba, when examining a Fish.
“Glub Glub.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fish.
“Ah, dead fish. The most unappetising of all smells.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Fish.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cá là một loại Thực phẩm Thịt thường đến từ Ao. Nó cũng rơi ra bởi Người Cá. Nó phục hồi 12,5 Sức Đói và cộng dồn lên 40 trong kho. Cá có thể được sấy khô trên Giá Phơi trong 1 ngày để tạo ra Thịt Khô Nhỏ, và là nguyên liệu chính trong Món Cá Que và Bánh Taco Cá bằng Nồi Hầm. Câu cá (như giết Gobblers) không làm tăng mức độ Nghịch ngợm của người chơi, nghĩa là nó là nguồn thực phẩm an toàn cho những ai sợ Krampus.

'''Fish''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] [[Item]] that typically comes from [[Pond]]s. It is also dropped by [[Merm]]s. It restores 12.5 [[Hunger]] and stacks to 40 in the inventory. Fish can be dried on the [[Drying Rack]] for 1 day to produce [[Small Jerky]], and are the main ingredient in [[Fishsticks]] and [[Fish Tacos]] using a [[Crock Pot]]. Fishing (like killing [[Gobblers]]) does not increase the player's [[Naughtiness]] level, meaning it is a safe food source for those fearing [[Krampus]].

Unlike most other Meat Foods, Fish can be eaten raw without losing [[Sanity]].

Fish can be obtained by using a [[Fishing Rod]] at a [[Pond]] or [[Lake]], or dropped by [[Merm]]s when killed (along with [[Frog Legs]]).

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Fish can be obtained by using a [[Trawl Net]] in the [[Ocean]].

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Fish and Cooked Fish have an alternate appearance based on carp. Fish can be obtained from [[Kingfisher]]s or by destroying a [[Renovate Tab|Tasteful Fish Mounting]].

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* When a Fish is on the ground, it flops around, then perishes, its eyes becoming crossed out.
* Fish having a spoilage time of 3 days could be a reference to one of Benjamin Franklin's quotes, "Guests are like fish. They stink after 3 days."

=={{Pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
* The ''Hamlet'' Fish has no unique [[Drying Rack]] texture.
